definition:
1. to seize around, embrace , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. to encompass  or surround  an enemy, so as to intercept  him, (Herdotus Historicus); μετεώρους τὰς ναῦς π. to intercept  them at sea, (Thucydides); ἐπεὰν δὲ αὐτὸν περιλάβῃς when you get hold of  him, catch  him, (Herdotus Historicus):—;Pass. to be caught , οἴμοι, περιείλημμαι μόνος (Aristophanes Comicus) 
3. to comprehend, include , of a number of particulars, (Isocrates Orator) (ML)
